productName: Collections - Full Spectrum - Hash Rosin - Icy Sundae - (DOH) - 1g
description: Double-refined hybrid hash rosin from Icy Sundae — washed, sifted, and cold-pressed with zero solvents, sitting right at the peak of the solventless pyramid. Maximum flavor, zero solvents, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, and an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
